message:
feat(fcp-bootstrap): typed hardware-token refusal variants with remediation guidance br-24llg.4.2.3

Each TokenError variant now maps to a distinct BootstrapError variant
with operator-facing remediation guidance instead of the catch-all
HardwareToken(String). Adds PinRequired, InvalidPin, PinLocked,
TokenNotFound, Unsupported, Disconnected, SessionExpired, Cancelled,
and ProviderFault typed outcomes. Includes 25+ new tests covering
error mapping, display/debug formatting, and cleanup determinism.

Also fixes CertificateCategory compilation error (not available in our
cryptoki version) by using subject==issuer CA heuristic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
